name: Anthem at Merrill Ranch Parkside
description: Come play pickleball at Anthem at Merrill Ranch Parkside in Florence, AZ! There are 8 outdoor clay courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Guests may participate, invited by a resident, for $3/person.

name: Anthem Merrill Ranch, Parkside Community Center
description: Anthem Merrill Ranch, Parkside Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Florence, AZ. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are private. Amenities include lights, locker rooms, and restrooms.
fees: Private — If you do not live in the Anthem Parkside Community, you can pay a small fee to use the court.  You will have pay in the community center.

name: Apache Junction Multi-generational Center

name: Casa Grande RV Resort
description: Casa Grande RV Resort is a great place to have fun and play pickleball. The courts are open from 8 a.m. to 10 p.m. and are lighted. They are available to the guests staying at the resort. We off clinics, lessons and tournaments. The tournaments we host are open to all people and all skill levels.  You can join in the fun by calling 520 421-0401 or follow us on FB
